name: Five-Alarm Beef Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds boneless beef chuck (up to 4 lbs), cubed
1 (4 oz) can chopped jalapenos or mild chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the beef and brown all sides.
2. Transfer the beef to a Crock-Pot.
3. Add the remaining 2 tablespoons oil to the skillet and saute the onions and green peppers until soft.
4. Transfer the sauteed vegetables to the Crock-Pot.
5. In the Crock-Pot, stir in the jalapenos, chili powder, oregano, cumin, salt, and beer.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
7. Serves 6 to 8
